name: Nitchitsu Co., Ltd.
summary: Nitchitsu Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial machinery. The company designs and manufactures marine equipment, air preheating machines, and other general industrial machinery; installs, constructs, and supervises machinery and equipment; mines, processes, and sells crystalline limestone; purchases and sells silica sand, gravel, sand, and crushed stone; and manufactures and sells refined silica powder, etc. It is also involved in the leasing of office buildings; and manufacture and sale of heat-resistant paints, and natural rubber products. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
